text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ مُسْلِمٍ تَنَصَّرَ قَالَ يُقْتَلُ وَ لَا يُسْتَتَابُ قُلْتُ فَنَصْرَانِيٌّ أَسْلَمَ ثُمَّ ارْتَدَّ عَنِ الْإِسْلَامِ قَالَ يُسْتَتَابُ فَإِنْ رَجَعَ وَ إِلَّا قُتِلَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Al Amraky Bin Ali Al Neysabouri,

(It has been narrated) from Ali son of Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, from his brother<sup>asws</sup> Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a Muslim who became a Christian. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be killed, and would not be told to repent’. I said, ‘So if a Christian became a Muslim, then reneged from Al-Islam?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be told to repent, so if he were to return (fine) or else killed’.
